verdict: T-021: SC-SCOPE 3rd-cumulant endpoint CLASS-WIDE. joint(rho_lat)=1/[(1/rho)(1+R_max)+(1-1/rho)/S] (MARGIN cancels); joint>1 <=> rho_lat>4.35 <=> T'<60.4 (K_budget=267 pattern-indep). T-017 T'<=13<60.4 => joint>=x1.0953 class-wide (worst mu^2-band), endpoint thinnest. Inherits thin-certified R_max=0.385 + T-017 pin + competitor-class (operator). STRONG EVIDENCE, no tier flip.

claims.name: joint_reduces_to_rho_lat_crit_4p35
claims.detail: (certified joint = MARGIN/(C_2+C_sunset+C_quartic); MARGIN CANCELS => joint(rho_lat)=1/[(1/rho)(1+R_max)+(1-1/rho)/S], monotone in rho_lat, saturating at S=1.13. joint=1 at rho_crit=4.347; joint(6.55)=x1.0403>1 reproduces the certified endpoint. R_max=0.385 (Parseval-pinned), S=1.13 sunset)

claims.name: critical_Tprime_above_admissible_pin
claims.detail: (rho_lat=K_budget/(1+T'), K_budget=267 pattern-independent (mu^2/I only); joint>1 <=> T'<K_budget/rho_crit-1 = 60.4. The competitor enters ONLY through its additive-energy richness T')

claims.name: Tprime_pin_closes_classwide
claims.detail: (T-017 pins T'<=13 over the admissible class; 13<60.4 => joint(T'=13)=x1.0974>1 at the operating endpoint, margin x4.6 in T'-space. The thin x1.040 lift was the conservative T'=n_pack=40.7 estimate; the actual admissible class gives x1.097)

claims.name: robust_mu2_band_and_I_sweep
claims.detail: (mu^2-band [x0.5,x2] at endpoint, T'=13: worst joint x1.0953>1 (ROBUSTNESS-MU2); I-sweep: endpoint I=2e-3 is the thinnest (x1.0974), rising to x1.1286 at I=4e-4. Class-wide closure holds across the certified band)

claims.name: quantitative_sanity_scscope_classwide
claims.detail: (joint saturates at x1.130=S as rho->inf (sunset cap); monotone (joint(4.0)=x0.990<1<joint(5.0)=x1.015); critical T'=60.4>13 pin. Inherits thin-certified R_max=0.385 + T-017 pin + competitor-class (operator item). No tier flip B1/B2 T6)
